_note: Microstructure snapshots MEASURED DURING the 2026 World Cup from the logged order books (build_basis.py, build_liquidity.py, calibrate_confed_offsets.py, build_blend_check.py). They are FROZEN here because the title market has since RESOLVED: re-running the builders on post-final data is degenerate (settled contracts, blown-out overrounds), so these values cannot be re-derived from the final snapshot. They are recorded point-in-time observations -- the same status as the frozen pre-tournament leg of pre-registration P7. Committing them makes every non-flagship number in the paper trace to a versioned artifact.
